title: Sales Engineer (Industrial Equipment)
description:
- Industrial Automation & Inspection Equipment
﻿- Paid Training for 3-6 months
﻿- Good Remuneration Salary Package
﻿
﻿Responsibilities: 

  • Attend a 3 to 6-month paid training program at the regional head office to master product knowledge and applications.

  • Provide technical consultation to solve customer applications by selecting and promoting the most suitable products.

  • Proactively secure new customers and drive market share growth within the assigned sales territory.

  • Travel to customer locations approximately three days per week to sell into various manufacturing industries.

  • Contribute to territory strategy, implement new product launches, and coordinate seminars or trade shows.

  • Respond promptly and efficiently to all customer requests and inquiries.

  • Manage day-to-day activities autonomously with minimal supervisory direction.

Requirements: 

  • Preferably a Degree in Business or an Engineering-related field.

  • Interest and aptitude for mastering highly technical products and working in manufacturing environments.

  • Excellent presentation, oral and written communication skills.

  • Goal-oriented, extremely hardworking, and driven to make a measurable contribution to the company's success.

  • Proactive in reacting to customer needs and a strong desire for self-improvement through intensive training and mentorship.

  • Holds a valid Class 3 driving licence and is willing to travel extensively, including potential overnight trips.

JOBID: RY637XRX

Please send your updated CV to josie.cha@peopleprofilers.com

All Successful candidates can expect a very competitive remuneration package and a comprehensive range of benefits.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

EA Personnel: Cha Zi Jing Josie

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
